data.body: S1 TDD: authored happy-path suite (tests/interfaces/facades/test_mcp_http_transport.py: config defaults/parse, invalid-transport reject, http boot serves initialize, stdio unchanged) + held-out edge/E2E suite (host 421/origin 403 with loopback defaults, non-loopback fail-closed gate x3, unauthenticated-http gate x2, MCP_ENV_VARS+server.json+regenerated-docs drift x4) kept in job tmp dir. Confirmed RED for right reasons: McpConfig lacks transport field, build_server lacks cfg arg, McpStartupError absent, env-vars/manifest/docs absent. mcp 1.28.1 API verified: FastMCP(host,port,streamable_http_path,transport_security,auth,token_verifier); TransportSecuritySettings(enable_dns_rebinding_protection,allowed_hosts,allowed_origins); run(transport='streamable-http'); Starlette TestClient drives streamable_http_app() lifespan; 421 Host/403 Origin confirmed. Dispatching held-out implementer for happy path.
